title: Functions, Scope, and Callable Contracts · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: Refactor the routing engine into testable calculations, validators, and reporting functions. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a function-oriented support workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define and call functions with purposeful names, small responsibilities, docstrings, and testable behavior.
Use positional-only, positional-or-keyword, keyword-only, default, variadic positional, and variadic keyword parameters deliberately.
Choose defaults without shared mutable state and distinguish omitted values from explicit None when needed.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-basics cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

# Add one tested, typed, inspectable program increment per activity.
